stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes, what is the block fuel required for a 1 hours and 50 min cruise time VFR flight with a class B multi-engined piston aircraft? The departure aerodrome will be used as the destination alternate. Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Taxi fuel: 8 L
Cruise fuel consumption: 58 L/h
Holding fuel Consumption: 50 L/h
Departure and Climb fuel: 30 L
Go Around and Climb fuel: 30 L
Approach and Landing fuel: 14 L
